etymology.description: phonetic 戌(戌) (xū, "ninth month") + semantic 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") = phonetic element with fire relation
etymology.interpretation: 烕(烕) (huǐ) utilizes 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") to suggest a connection to burning or destruction, while 戌(戌) (xū, "ninth month") serves as the phonetic component. This creates a character associated with a concept related to fire or extinguishing in a phonetic context.
